steps.title: Match the 1613 event
steps.content: The sentence describes a completed historical event in 1613. The blank needs the same simple past tense used by 'ignited' and 'was hurt.'

steps.title: Reject other tenses
steps.content: Choice A uses present perfect, which does not fit the dated past event. Choice C uses future tense. Choice D uses simple present for a current or recurring action. The simple past verb matches the historical narration. The answer is B.
